title: Selective Entity Removal
description: Selective Entity Removal (Fabric) allows the user to disable specific mobs from rendering and set the range at which they are visible.
body:
Selective Entity Removal (Fabric) provides users with two different options for every entity, they can disable the mob from rendering completely, or they can set the range in which the mob will be render.

This mod depends on:
Mod Menu
Cloth Config

 

For fabric version 1.16.4+
